module._source: IMX179 Sony datasheet (1.4 um pitch, 3264x2448 active) + Mi Pad 1 Primax module estimate

_note: `active` — consumed by the current HAL; hardcodes in code are replaced with reads from here. `reserved` — preserved verbatim from the stock NVIDIA .isp, not consumed yet; keys migrate to `active` as the corresponding shader stages ship.
